location.office_time_required: 70%+ field travel; some time working remotely

level_signals: 4+ years of in-person, outside B2B sales experience required
Base salary range $93,840–$138,000 consistent with mid-senior individual contributor
Reports to Regional Sales Manager, no people management implied

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 4+ years of in-person, outside B2B sales experience (field experience is required)
You have proven success running short, high-velocity, full sales cycles – including same-day closes.
You have strong prospecting, hunting, and negotiation skills.
You are energized by extensive travel – spending 70%+ of your time in the field, including overnight travel inside and outside of your home state.
You have demonstrated success operating autonomously and thrive in environments where you will create the playbook, not follow one.
You are entrepreneurial, adaptable, and motivated building and scaling new markets.
You are comfortable using Salesforce, Google Workspace, and sales productivity tools.
You will need to live by or in proximity to a major airport.

scope.surface: Emerging Markets (T4–T5 geographies) — Wisconsin region; SMB restaurant and retailer partnerships on DoorDash platform
scope.business_model: marketplace / platform; revenue-share agreements with SMB merchants
primary_metrics_inferred: Market expansion velocity (deal close rate, time-to-close)
core_responsibilities: Expand DoorDash's presence by traveling to emerging markets and developing new restaurant partnerships.
Lead end-to-end, in-person sales cycles– prospecting, pitching, negotiating, and closing.
Sell business owners on DoorDash's value and secure revenue-share agreements.
Consistently execute high-volume field activity and close deals within days.
Build scalable approaches and playbooks to accelerate market expansion.
Shape DoorDash's expansion strategy in rural economies.
Have an outsized impact on growth in high-priority markets.

compensation.equity_form: equity grants mentioned; sales commission also included

green_flags: Compensation range fully disclosed: base $93,840–$138,000 and OTE $156,400–$230,000
Equity grants mentioned in addition to base + commission
Clear role scope and ownership (T4–T5 emerging markets in Wisconsin)
Strong company priority framing — 'one of DoorDash's highest company priorities'
Comprehensive benefits package including 401(k) match, 16 weeks paid parental leave, premium healthcare
Reports directly to Regional Sales Manager — clear reporting line
red_flags: 70%+ travel requirement including overnight travel is very demanding and may not suit all candidates
Role requires living near a major airport — geographic constraint not all candidates will meet
No visa sponsorship information explicitly stated
No preferred/nice-to-have criteria listed — leaves uncertainty about what differentiates strong candidates
Rural/T4–T5 market focus may mean less institutional support compared to core city teams

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range and years requirement)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and revenue-share language)
location.type set to 'hybrid' — role is predominantly field travel with some remote work; not a traditional office hybrid
ambiguities: Location type: the role is described as 'field sales' with 70%+ travel and 'some time working remotely' — classified as hybrid but is functionally a remote+field role, not a traditional office hybrid. No fixed office location mentioned.
Visa sponsorship: not addressed anywhere in the JD; marked 'unclear'.
total_comp_estimate_usd field populated from stated OTE range ($156,400–$230,000) which is labeled as 'total on-target earnings (base + commissions)' — treated as stated, not inferred.
